summary: Leading the development and modernization of internal financial applications that support payout operations, workforce management, and project tracking. Partner with cross-functional teams to deliver reliable, maintainable software that integrates with legacy systems and meets enterprise compliance standards.

items: Architected MVC models and view models for modular data management across Task, Employee, Projects, and Status modules
Built and maintained production modules end-to-end — from data layer through UI — ensuring consistent workflow integration across teams
Designed intuitive interfaces for internal operators and business stakeholders, improving usability and adoption of new tooling
Integrated the Payout Project with legacy financial systems, enabling real-time data synchronization and more reliable processing pipelines
Established clear error-handling patterns and interface contracts to reduce integration failures and support faster incident resolution
Optimized database operations through complex SQL queries and stored procedures, improving report and transaction query performance
Maintained data integrity across interconnected modules while supporting evolving business requirements in a regulated environment
Orchestrated end-to-end software delivery — builds, releases, and deployments — with disciplined debugging and systematic defect resolution
Upheld code quality through structured reviews, consistent patterns, and proactive maintenance of shared application components

highlights: Architected MVC models and view models for modular data management across Task, Employee, Projects, and Status modules
Integrated the Payout Project with legacy financial systems, enabling real-time data synchronization
Optimized database operations through complex SQL queries and stored procedures, improving query performance
Orchestrated end-to-end software delivery pipeline, managing builds, releases, and deployments
